hmong.strong_acid_strong_base: Kua qaub muaj zog + Yeeb muaj zog
hmong.weak_acid_strong_base: Kua qaub qaug zog + Yeeb muaj zog
hmong.strong_acid_weak_base: Kua qaub muaj zog + Yeeb qaug zog
hmong.polyprotic_acid_3_equiv_pts: Kua qaub polyprotic (3 lub ntsiab sib npaug)
hmong.back_titration_of_antacid: Rov qab titration ntawm tshuaj tiv kua qaub
hmong.safety_goggles_on: Rau lub tsom iav nyab xeeb lawm
hmong.splash_proof_chemical_safety_goggles_n: Tsom iav tiv kua tshuaj tsis txhob nphoo, tsis yog tsom iav ntsuas qhov muag
hmong.nitrile_gloves_worn: Hnav hnab looj tes nitrile lawm
hmong.protects_skin_from_corrosive_acids_and: Tiv thaiv tawv nqaij ntawm cov kua qaub thiab yeeb uas noj tau
hmong.button_it_up_protects_clothing_and_ski: Kaw cov khawm: tiv thaiv khaub ncaws thiab tawv nqaij ntawm kev nphoo
hmong.no_sandals_or_open_toed_shoes_in_the_c: Tsis pub rau khau qab tiab lossis khau qhib ntiv taw hauv chav lab tshuaj
hmong.eyewash_station_located: Nrhiav tau qhov ntxuav qhov muag
hmong.know_where_it_is_before_you_start_you_: Paub qhov chaw ua ntej koj pib: koj muaj 10 vib nas this yog raug nphoo
hmong.fire_extinguisher_located: Nrhiav tau lub tua hluav taws
hmong.acetic_acid_is_flammable_know_your_nea: Acetic acid kub hnyiab tau: paub koj lub tua hluav taws uas nyob ze tshaj
hmong.sds_reviewed_for_chemicals: Tau tshuaj xyuas daim ntawv nyab xeeb (SDS) rau cov tshuaj lawm
hmong.safety_data_sheets_list_all_hazards_pp: Cov ntawv nyab xeeb teev txhua qhov phom sij, khoom tiv thaiv, thiab cov txheej txheem xwm txheej ceev
hmong.always_add_titrant_slowly_near_the_exp: Ntxiv titrant qeeb qeeb ze lub ntsiab kawg uas xav tau txhua zaus. Ib teev tuaj yeem hloov pH ntau heev!
hmong.the_ph_is_changing_rapidly_in_a_real_l: pH tabtom hloov sai heev! Hauv chav lab tiag, hloov mus rau kev ntxiv ib teev zuj zus thiab do tom qab txhua teev.
hmong.you_overshot_the_equivalence_point_in_: Koj hla dhau lub ntsiab sib npaug lawm! Hauv chav lab tiag, koj yuav tsum pib dua nrog ib qho qauv tshiab.
hmong.good_lab_practice_always_rinse_the_bur: Kev coj ua lab zoo: ntxuav lub burette nrog dej ntshiab ua ntej txhua zaus, ces nrog cov kua titrant ua ntej rov ntim.
hmong.at_the_half_equivalence_point_ph_pka_t: Ntawm lub ntsiab ib nrab sib npaug, pH = pKa. Qhov no yog qhov chaw nruab nrab ntawm cheeb tsam buffer!
hmong.kmno_is_a_strong_oxidizer_in_a_real_la: KMnO₄ yog ib qho oxidizer muaj zog! Hauv chav lab tiag, khaws nws deb ntawm cov kua organic thiab siv lub tsev hood. Xiav paj → tsis muaj xim = lub ntsiab kawg.
hmong.polyprotic_acids_have_multiple_equival: Cov kua qaub polyprotic muaj ntau lub ntsiab sib npaug! Saib seb txoj kab S nrwm nruab nrab ntawm txhua lub ntsiab li cas (cov cheeb tsam buffer).
hmong.in_a_back_titration_you_add_excess_aci: Hauv rov qab titration, koj ntxiv kua qaub ntau dhau ua ntej, ces titrate cov kua qaub uas seem. Nws siv tau rau cov khoom uas tsis yaj xws li CaCO₃.
hmong.never_add_water_to_concentrated_acid_a: Tsis txhob ntxiv dej rau kua qaub tuab li! Ntxiv kua qaub rau dej txhua zaus. «Ua kom zoo: kua qaub rau dej.» Cov tshuaj tso tawm cua sov tuaj yeem ua rau nphoo phom sij.
hmong.when_using_volatile_reagents_like_nh_o: Thaum siv cov tshuaj ncho yooj yim xws li NH₃ lossis HCl (tuab), ua haujlwm hauv qab lub tsev hood txhua zaus. Ua pa cov pa kua qaub/yeeb ua rau lub ntsws puas.
hmong.read_the_burette_at_the_bottom_of_the_: Nyeem lub burette ntawm qab ntawm lub meniscus, nrog koj lub qhov muag nyob rau theem ntawm nplaim dej. Kev yuam kev parallax cuam tshuam kev raug!
hmong.acid_splash_on_skin: Kua qaub nphoo rau tawv nqaij!
hmong.while_pouring_hcl_some_splashes_on_you: Thaum hliv HCl, qee qhov nphoo rau koj txhais caj npab.
hmong.remove_clothing_rinse_under_running_wa: Hle khaub ncaws, ntxuav hauv qab dej ntws 15+ feeb
hmong.correct_immediate_and_prolonged_rinsin: Yog lawm! Kev ntxuav tam sim thiab ntev yog qhov tseem ceeb. 15 feeb tiv thaiv kev puas tsuaj ntawm cov ntaub so.
hmong.wipe_it_off_with_a_paper_towel: So nws tawm nrog daim ntawv so
hmong.wrong_wiping_can_spread_the_acid_and_p: Yuam kev! Kev so tuaj yeem ua rau kua qaub nthuav thiab thawb kua qaub rau hauv koj tawv nqaij. Koj xav tau dej ntws tam sim.
hmong.apply_baking_soda_paste_directly_to_sk: Pleev cov kua baking soda ncaj qha rau tawv nqaij
hmong.not_recommended_the_neutralization_rea: Tsis pom zoo! Cov tshuaj neutralization tsim cua sov (exothermic) uas tuaj yeem ua rau hlawv phem ntxiv. Dej yog qhov teb tam sim thawj zaug txhua zaus.
hmong.it_s_dilute_just_keep_working: Nws yog dilute, tsuas yog ua haujlwm mus ntxiv
hmong.dangerous_even_dilute_acids_can_cause_: Txaus ntshai! Txawm tias cov kua qaub dilute tuaj yeem ua rau hlawv raws sijhawm. Daws kev sib cuag tshuaj tam sim txhua zaus.
hmong.naoh_solution_splashes_into_your_eyes_: Cov kua NaOH nphoo rau hauv koj qhov muag thaum do.
hmong.go_to_eyewash_station_immediately_rins: Mus rau qhov ntxuav qhov muag tam sim, ntxuav 15+ feeb, qhib tawv muag
hmong.correct_speed_is_everything_you_have_a: Yog lawm! Kev ceev yog txhua yam: koj muaj kwv yees li 10 vib nas this ua ntej kev puas tsuaj hnyav pib. Qhib tawv muag thiab ntxeev koj taub hau kom tsis txhob lo mus rau lwm lub qhov muag.
hmong.rub_your_eyes_and_blink_rapidly: Zuaj koj qhov muag thiab ntsais qhov muag sai
hmong.never_rub_this_spreads_the_chemical_ac: Tsis txhob zuaj li! Qhov no ua rau tshuaj nthuav mus thoob plaws qhov muag dav dua thiab tuaj yeem txhuam qhov muag.
hmong.use_eye_drops_from_the_first_aid_kit: Siv cov tshuaj tsau qhov muag ntawm lub thawv pab thawj
hmong.eye_drops_are_insufficient_you_need_hi: Cov tshuaj tsau qhov muag tsis txaus! Koj xav tau kev ntxuav ntau 15+ feeb. Cov tshuaj tsau qhov muag ua tsis tau li ntawd.
hmong.finish_the_experiment_first_then_wash: Ua kom tiav kev sim ua ntej, ces ntxuav
hmong.extremely_dangerous_naoh_causes_alkali: Txaus ntshai heev! NaOH ua rau hlawv alkali uas nkag mus tob dua raws sijhawm. Txhua vib nas this tseem ceeb. Kev raug mob qhov muag los ntawm tshuaj yog qhov ua rau dig muag nyob rau chav lab.
hmong.large_acid_spill_on_bench: Kua qaub nphoo ntau rau saum rooj!
hmong.you_knock_over_the_beaker_of_0_1m_hcl_: Koj ntaus lub beaker 0.1M HCl vau, ua rau nphoo kwv yees 200 ml rau saum rooj.
hmong.alert_others_contain_with_absorbent_ne: Ceeb toom lwm tus, tswj nrog absorbent, neutralize nrog NaHCO₃, ntxuav nrog dej
hmong.perfect_procedure_1_alert_nearby_stude: Cov txheej txheem zoo tag nrho! (1) Ceeb toom cov tub ntxhais kawm nyob ze (2) Tswj kev nthuav nrog cov pad absorbent (3) Nphoo sodium bicarbonate los neutralize (4) Ntxuav nrog dej (5) Muab pov tseg kom raug.
hmong.just_flood_it_with_lots_of_water: Tsuas yog nphoo nrog dej ntau
hmong.partially_right_but_incomplete_floodin: Ib nrab yog tab sis tsis tiav. Kev nphoo ua rau kua qaub nthuav dav dua thiab tsis ua neutralize nws. Tswj ua ntej, ces neutralize, ces ntxuav.
hmong.tell_the_teacher_and_don_t_touch_it: Qhia rau tus xibfwb thiab tsis txhob kov nws
hmong.telling_the_teacher_is_good_but_at_0_1: Kev qhia xibfwb yog qhov zoo tab sis ntawm 0.1M qhov no tswj tau. Koj yuav tsum pib tswj tam sim thaum ib tug ceeb toom rau tus qhia. Tsis txhob cia nws mus txog npoo rooj.
hmong.soak_it_up_with_paper_towels: Nqus nws nrog cov ntawv so
hmong.paper_towels_are_not_appropriate_for_a: Cov ntawv so tsis tsim nyog rau kua qaub nphoo! Nws tsis neutralize kua qaub thiab koj yuav tuav cov khoom ntub kua qaub. Siv lub thawv daws kev nphoo kom raug.
hmong.while_working_with_ammonia_nh_you_noti: Thaum ua haujlwm nrog ammonia (NH₃), koj pom hnov tsw ntxhiab thiab koj qhov muag pib los kua muag.
hmong.move_the_experiment_to_the_fume_hood_i: Txav kev sim mus rau lub tsev hood tam sim, ua kom cheeb tsam huv cua
hmong.correct_volatile_chemicals_like_nh_mus: Yog lawm! Cov tshuaj ncho yooj yim xws li NH₃ yuav tsum tuav hauv qab lub tsev hood. Yog koj hnov nws tsw, koj tabtom ua pa nws. Qhib qhov rais thiab tawm mus ua pa huv cua yog lub hood nyob deb.
hmong.put_on_a_face_mask_and_continue: Rau lub npog ntsej muag thiab ua txuas ntxiv
hmong.a_regular_face_mask_does_not_protect_a: Lub npog ntsej muag ib txwm tsis tiv thaiv cov pa tshuaj! Koj xav tau kev tiv thaiv ua pa kom raug (tsis muaj hauv feem ntau chav lab tsev kawm ntawv) lossis lub tsev hood.
hmong.fan_the_fumes_away_with_your_hand: Ntxuaj cov pa tawm nrog koj txhais tes
hmong.fanning_is_for_wafting_to_detect_odors: Kev ntxuaj yog rau kev ntxuaj maj mam los saib tsw (coj cua maj mam mus rau koj lub qhov ntswg). Nws tsis tshem cov pa phom sij tawm ntawm cheeb tsam. Koj xav tau kev huv cua!
hmong.it_s_just_a_little_smell_keep_going: Nws tsuas yog tsw me me, ua mus ntxiv
hmong.dangerous_if_you_can_smell_nh_the_conc: Txaus ntshai! Yog koj hnov tsw NH₃, qhov concentration tuaj yeem dhau qhov txwv nyab xeeb (25 ppm). Kev sib cuag ntev ua rau hlawv tshuaj hauv txoj kev ua pa. NH₃ ntawm >300 ppm tuaj yeem ua rau tuag.
hmong.someone_brought_bleach: Ib tug neeg nqa bleach los!
hmong.a_classmate_suggests_cleaning_the_benc: Ib tug phooj ywg qhia kom ntxuav lub rooj nrog bleach thaum koj tseem qhib cov kua ammonia.
hmong.stop_them_immediately_bleach_ammonia_t: Tsom nrees lawv tam sim! Bleach + ammonia = pa chloramine muaj taus
hmong.life_saving_action_naocl_2nh_2nh_cl_ch: Kev cawm txoj sia! NaOCl + 2NH₃ → 2NH₂Cl (chloramine) — cov pa muaj taus uas ua rau puas kev ua pa hnyav. Qhov no yog ib qho ntawm cov kev sib xyaw phom sij tshaj plaws hauv chav lab. Neutralize thiab muab pov tseg txhua yam tshuaj ua ntej siv cov tshuaj ntxuav txhua zaus.
hmong.sure_bleach_is_a_disinfectant_it_shoul: Tau, bleach yog tshuaj tua kab mob, nws yuav tsum zoo
hmong.extremely_dangerous_mixing_bleach_naoc: Txaus ntshai heev! Kev sib xyaw bleach (NaOCl) nrog ammonia tsim cov pa chloramine muaj taus. Qhov no tau ua rau tuag hauv chav lab thiab tsev. Tsis txhob sib xyaw bleach nrog lwm yam tshuaj li.
hmong.it_should_be_fine_if_the_ammonia_is_di: Nws yuav tsum zoo yog tias ammonia yog dilute
hmong.wrong_even_dilute_ammonia_reacts_with_: Yuam kev! Txawm tias dilute ammonia tseem sib cuam nrog bleach los tsim cov pa chloramine muaj taus. Cov tshuaj tshwm ntawm txhua concentration. Tsis muaj kev dilute nyab xeeb rau kev sib xyaw cov tshuaj no.
hmong.just_open_a_window_and_it_will_be_fine: Tsuas yog qhib qhov rais ces nws yuav zoo
hmong.ventilation_does_not_make_it_safe_to_g: Kev huv cua tsis ua rau nws nyab xeeb los tsim cov pa muaj taus! Chloramine ua rau ua pa nyuaj tam sim. Kev tiv thaiv yog txoj kev tsuas uas txais tau.
hmong.delivers_precise_volumes_of_titrant: Xa cov ntim titrant kom raug.
hmong.holds_the_analyte_solution_being_titra: Tuav cov kua analyte uas tabtom titrate.
hmong.measures_exact_volumes_of_analyte: Ntsuas cov ntim raug ntawm analyte.
hmong.changes_color_to_signal_the_endpoint: Hloov xim los qhia lub ntsiab kawg.
hmong.contains_distilled_water_for_rinsing: Muaj dej distilled rau kev ntxuav.
hmong.goggles_gloves_and_lab_coat: Tsom iav, hnab looj tes, thiab tsho lab
hmong.all_three_are_mandatory_goggles_protec: Peb yam yog yuav tsum tau: tsom iav tiv thaiv qhov muag ntawm kev nphoo, hnab looj tes tiv thaiv tes ntawm cov noj, thiab tsho lab tiv thaiv khaub ncaws thiab tawv nqaij.
hmong.water_first_always_the_15_minute_rinse: Dej ua ntej txhua zaus! Kev ntxuav 15 feeb yog qhov tseem ceeb. Cov tshuaj neutralize tuaj yeem ua rau exothermic saum tawv nqaij.
hmong.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base: Qhov moles ntawm kua qaub = moles ntawm yeeb
hmong.the_equivalence_point_is_the_stoichiom: Lub ntsiab sib npaug yog lub ntsiab stoichiometric. pH ntawm sib npaug nyob ntawm qhov muaj zog ntawm kua qaub/yeeb — nws yog pH 7 rau kua qaub muaj zog + yeeb muaj zog nkaus xwb.
hmong.the_exothermic_reaction_can_cause_viol: Cov tshuaj exothermic tuaj yeem ua rau txias hnyav thiab nphoo
hmong.when_water_hits_concentrated_acid_the_: Thaum dej ntaus kua qaub tuab, cov cua sov tso tawm tuaj yeem ua rau dej txias tam sim, ua rau nphoo hnyav ntawm kua qaub kub. Kev ntxiv kua qaub rau dej nthuav cua sov thoob plaws ntim dej loj dua.
hmong.at_equivalence_only_the_conjugate_base: Ntawm sib npaug, tsuas yog conjugate base (A⁻) seem. Conjugate base ntawm kua qaub qaug zog nws tus kheej yog yeeb qaug zog, ua rau cov kua yog yeeb (pH > 7).
hmong.strong_acid_strong_base_or_weak_acid_s: Kua qaub muaj zog + yeeb muaj zog lossis kua qaub qaug zog + yeeb muaj zog
hmong.phenolphthalein_transitions_at_ph_8_2_: Phenolphthalein hloov ntawm pH 8.2-10.0 uas phim rau lub sib npaug pH yeeb ntawm kua qaub qaug zog + yeeb muaj zog titration. Nws kuj ua haujlwm rau kua qaub muaj zog+yeeb muaj zog vim qhov dhia hla nws cheeb tsam.
hmong.bleach_ammonia_chloramine_gas_toxic_bl: Bleach + ammonia = pa chloramine (muaj taus). Bleach + kua qaub = pa chlorine (muaj taus). Ob leeg tuaj yeem ua rau raug mob kev ua pa hnyav lossis tuag. Tsis txhob sib xyaw bleach nrog lwm yam tshuaj li.
hmong.23_45_has_4_significant_figures_the_la: 23.45 muaj 4 tus lej tseem ceeb. Tus lej kawg (5) yog kwv yees nruab nrab ntawm cov ntsuas. Cov burette raug txog ±0.05 ml.
hmong.at_half_equivalence_ha_a_so_henderson_: Ntawm ib nrab sib npaug [HA] = [A⁻] yog li Henderson–Hasselbalch muab pH = pKa + log(1) = pKa. Qhov no yog qhov chaw nruab nrab ntawm cheeb tsam buffer.
hmong.when_handling_1m_concentrated_acids_or: Thaum tuav cov kua qaub lossis yeeb tuab >1M
hmong.face_shields_provide_splash_protection: Cov thaiv ntsej muag muab kev tiv thaiv nphoo rau tag nrho lub ntsej muag. Yuav tsum tau rau cov noj tuab (>1M), kev ua kom sov, thiab txhua txheej txheem uas muaj kev pheej hmoo nphoo dhau cheeb tsam qhov muag.
hmong.naoh_causes_alkali_burns_that_penetrat: NaOH ua rau hlawv alkali uas nkag mus rau hauv qhov muag hauv 10 vib nas this. Yog tsis muaj tsom iav, ib qho nphoo tuaj yeem ua rau poob kev pom mus tas li.
hmong.concentrated_hcl_dissolves_skin_on_con: HCl tuab yaj tawv nqaij thaum sib cuag. Txawm tias cov kua qaub dilute ua rau khaus. Koj txhais tes nyob ze tshuaj tshaj.
hmong.a_splash_of_acid_or_base_will_burn_thr: Ib qho nphoo ntawm kua qaub lossis yeeb yuav hlawv dhau khaub ncaws thiab tawv nqaij. Tsho lab muab ib txheej thaiv uas tshem tawm tau.
hmong.a_dropped_beaker_sends_glass_and_chemi: Ib lub beaker poob xa iav thiab tshuaj thoob plaws hauv pem teb. Khau qhib ntiv taw txhais tau tias kua qaub saum ko taw liab qab.

hmong.continue_to_lab_scan: 🔬 Txuas ntxiv mus rau kev kuaj chav lab →

hmong.find_each_piece_of_safety_equipment_on: Nrhiav txhua yam khoom nyab xeeb saum daim ntawv qhia chav lab. Hauv xwm txheej ceev tiag, vib nas this tseem ceeb — koj yuav tsum paub qhov chaw txhua yam ua ntej pib.
hmong.eyewash_station_located_2: 🚿 Nrhiav tau qhov ntxuav qhov muag!
hmong.the_10_second_rule_if_chemicals_splash: Kev cai 10 vib nas this: yog tshuaj nphoo rau koj qhov muag, koj muaj kwv yees li 10 vib nas this los mus txog qhov ntxuav qhov muag ua ntej kev puas tsuaj mus tas li pib. Qhib tawv muag thiab ntxuav 15+ feeb.
hmong.fire_extinguisher_located_2: 🧯 Nrhiav tau lub tua hluav taws!
hmong.remember_p_a_s_s_pull_the_pin_aim_at_b: Nco P.A.S.S.: Pull (rub tus pin), Aim (taw rau qab hluav taws), Squeeze (nias tus kov), Sweep (cheb ib sab mus rau ib sab). Acetic acid thiab qee cov kua kub hnyiab tau — paub qhov chaw no ua ntej pib.
hmong.safety_data_sheets_located: 📋 Nrhiav tau cov ntawv nyab xeeb!
hmong.sds_documents_list_all_hazards_require: Cov ntaub ntawv SDS teev tag nrho cov phom sij, cov khoom tiv thaiv xav tau, cov kauj ruam pab thawj, thiab cov neeg hu xov tooj xwm txheej ceev rau txhua yam tshuaj hauv chav lab. Tshuaj xyuas lawv ua ntej tuav ib yam tshuaj.
hmong.lab_safety_map_complete: 🗺️ Daim ntawv qhia kev nyab xeeb chav lab tiav!
hmong.you_can_now_locate_all_emergency_equip: Tam sim no koj tuaj yeem nrhiav tag nrho cov khoom xwm txheej ceev los ntawm koj lub rooj. Hauv xwm txheej ceev, txhua vib nas this tseem ceeb — kev paub no tuaj yeem cawm txoj sia.

hmong.continue_to_chemical_briefing: Txuas ntxiv mus rau kev qhia tshuaj
hmong.continue_to_chemical_briefing_2: ☣️ Txuas ntxiv mus rau kev qhia tshuaj →
hmong.chemical_hazard_briefing: ☣️ Kev qhia txog kev phom sij ntawm tshuaj

hmong.tap_to_acknowledge_you_ve_reviewed_thi: ☝ Kais los lees paub tias koj tau tshuaj xyuas yam tshuaj no

hmong.chemical_hazard_information: ☣️ Cov ntaub ntawv phom sij tshuaj
hmong.titrate_find_the_equivalence_point: Titrate — Nrhiav lub ntsiab sib npaug
hmong.add_titrant_drop_by_drop_until_indicat: Ntxiv titrant ib teev zuj zus mus txog thaum indicator hloov xim. Lub ntsiab sib npaug = kev sib npaug stoichiometric; lub ntsiab kawg = qhov indicator hloov. Lawv tsis yog tib yam txhua zaus.
hmong.challenge_graded_titrations: Kev sib tw — Cov titration muaj qhab nia
hmong.match_real_world_unknowns_by_titrating: Phim cov khoom tsis paub hauv ntiaj teb tiag los ntawm titrate txog ±0.05 ml ntawm tus nqi theory. Taug qab kev raug + kev ceev; kev qhab nia phim AP Chem.
hmong.safety_drills_what_could_go_wrong: Kev xyaum nyab xeeb — Dab tsi tuaj yeem yuam kev
hmong.burette_explodes_acid_burns_spill_indi: Burette tawg, kua qaub hlawv nphoo, indicator ntxiv sai dhau. Xyaum cov txheej txheem teb yog lawm ua ntej nws tseem ceeb hauv chav lab tiag.
hmong.equipment_burette_flask_pipette: Cov khoom siv — Burette, flask, pipette
hmong.burette_tolerance_0_05_ml_volumetric_f: Burette tolerance 0.05 ml; volumetric flask 0.10 ml; pipette 0.02 ml. Qib kev raug A xijpeem B ua rau qhov yuam kev ntxiv ob npaug. Kev kho ntsuas tseem ceeb dua li cov tub ntxhais kawm paub.
hmong.stock_diluent_desired_concentration_th: Kua stock + diluent → concentration xav tau. Plaub cov teeb meem AP Chem uas ntsuas ntau tshaj los txo mus rau tib qhov sib npaug no. Taug qab cov lej tseem ceeb: qhov ntsuas tsis muaj zog tshaj txiav txim rau cov lus teb.
hmong.buffer_discovery_when_does_a_buffer_ho: Kev nrhiav buffer — Thaum twg buffer tuav?
hmong.adjust_acid_strength_a_ha_ratio_starti: Kho qhov muaj zog kua qaub, qhov piv [A⁻]/[HA], thiab pib pH. Cov txiaj ntsig sib cais: buffer zoo lossis buffer phem (tom qab ntxiv 20% kua qaub ntxiv). Tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis muaj kev nthuav tawm — tsuas yog tshawb nrhiav thiab soj ntsuam xwb.
hmong.endpoint_equivalence: ⚠ Lub ntsiab kawg ≠ lub ntsiab sib npaug.
hmong.redox_titration_not_a_ph_curve: ⚗ Redox titration — tsis yog pH curve.
hmong.the_trace_shows_relative_reaction_prog: Txoj kab qhia kev nce qib tshuaj sib piv, tsis yog pH — tsis muaj pH meter ntawm no. Lub ntsiab kawg yog thawj xim pink liab uas tuav los ntawm qhov excess me me ntawm MnO₄⁻ (nws sib cuam xiav paj → tsis muaj xim mus txog thaum ntawd). Nyeem lub ntsiab kawg no los ntawm xim.
hmong.reset_titration_volume_to_zero: Rov pib ntim titration mus rau xoom
hmong.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base_the_: — qhov moles ntawm kua qaub = moles ntawm yeeb. pH ntawm lub ntsiab no nyob ntawm qhov muaj zog ntawm kua qaub/yeeb.
hmong.where_the_indicator_changes_color_idea: — qhov indicator hloov xim. Zoo tshaj xaiv kom lub ntsiab kawg ≈ lub ntsiab sib npaug.
hmong.the_flat_part_of_a_weak_acid_base_curv: — qhov tiaj ntawm kua qaub/yeeb qaug zog curve qhov chaw pH tiv kev hloov (Henderson–Hasselbalch ua haujlwm).
hmong.weak_acids_bases_that_change_color_at_: — cov kua qaub/yeeb qaug zog uas hloov xim ntawm cov pH range tshwj xeeb. Xaiv ib qho uas nws qhov hloov range suav nrog qhov sib npaug pH.
hmong.lab_safety_best_practices: ⚠️ Cov kev coj nyab xeeb chav lab zoo tshaj
hmong.acid_spill_neutralize_with_sodium_bica: — Kua qaub nphoo: neutralize nrog sodium bicarbonate, ces ntxuav. Yeeb nphoo: neutralize nrog citric acid dilute. Ceeb toom lwm tus hauv chav lab txhua zaus.
hmong.never_mix_bleach_with_ammonia_toxic_ch: — Tsis txhob sib xyaw bleach nrog ammonia li (pa chloramine muaj taus). Tsis txhob ntxiv dej rau kua qaub tuab li (kev pheej hmoo nphoo exothermic — ntxiv kua qaub rau dej txhua zaus).
hmong.rinse_the_burette_with_the_titrant_sol: — Ntxuav lub burette nrog cov kua titrant ua ntej ntim. Do maj mam tom qab txhua qhov ntxiv. Nyeem lub burette ntawm qab ntawm lub meniscus.
hmong.waste_disposal: ♻️ Kev pov tseg khoom pov tseg
hmong.neutralized_acid_base_solutions_ph_6_8: — Cov kua qaub/yeeb neutralize lawm (pH 6–8) tuaj yeem mus rau qhov dej nrog dej ntau. Tshuaj xyuas koj lub koom haum txoj cai pov tseg tshuaj rau cov kua tuab.
hmong.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: Siv cov lus yooj yim niaj hnub thiab cov kab lus luv
hmong.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: Rau ib tug tub ntxhais kawm qib 5, luv thiab phooj ywg
hmong.for_a_high_school_chemistry_student_ac: Rau ib tug tub ntxhais kawm chemistry high school, raug tab sis nkag siab yooj yim
hmong.click_explain_to_have_the_ai_tutor_des: Nyem «Piav qhia» kom AI tutor piav txog titration no ntawm theem nyeem ntawv uas koj xaiv.
hmong.lab_safety_chemistry_challenge: 🏆 Kev sib tw kev nyab xeeb chav lab thiab chemistry
hmong.lab_safety_incident_simulator: 🚨 Lub simulator xwm txheej nyab xeeb chav lab
hmong.practice_responding_to_real_lab_emerge: Xyaum teb rau cov xwm txheej ceev chav lab tiag. Xaiv kev teb yog lawm rau txhua qhov xwm txheej. Cov kev xyaum no tuaj yeem cawm koj txoj sia hauv chav lab tiag!
hmong.lab_equipment_proper_technique: 🔬 Cov khoom siv chav lab thiab txoj kev ua kom raug
hmong.master_the_correct_technique_for_each_: Kawm kom paub txoj kev ua kom raug rau txhua yam khoom siv. Txoj kev zoo = cov txiaj ntsig raug + kev ua haujlwm chav lab nyab xeeb.
hmong.common_errors: ⚠️ Cov yuam kev uas feem ntau
hmong.c_v_c_v_calculate_how_to_dilute_a_stoc: C₁V₁ = C₂V₂ — xam seb yuav ua li cas dilute cov kua stock mus rau qhov target concentration.
hmong.critical_safety_reminder: Lus ceeb toom nyab xeeb tseem ceeb
hmong.always_add_acid_to_water_never_water_t: Ntxiv kua qaub rau dej txhua zaus, tsis txhob ntxiv dej rau kua qaub li. Kev sib xyaw exothermic thiab tuaj yeem ua rau txias hnyav thiab nphoo kua qaub tuab.
hmong.add_the_stock_solution_to_the_water_ne: Ntxiv cov kua stock rau dej (tsis txhob ntxiv dej rau kua qaub li!)
hmong.stopper_and_invert_10_times_to_mix_tho: Kaw thiab ntxeev 10 zaus kom sib xyaw kom zoo
hmong.titration_curve_finding_the_equivalenc: Titration curve — Nrhiav lub ntsiab sib npaug
hmong.strong_acid_strong_base_ph_meter_shows: Kua qaub muaj zog + yeeb muaj zog · pH meter qhia dhia
hmong.buffer_strength_discovery: 🛡️ Kev nrhiav qhov muaj zog buffer
hmong.three_sliders_weak_acid_strength_ka_bu: Peb lub slider: qhov muaj zog kua qaub qaug zog (Ka), qhov piv buffer [A⁻]/[HA], thiab pib pH. Lub simulation qhia koj tias buffer tuav lossis poob tom qab ntxiv 20% kua qaub ntxiv (cov txiaj ntsig sib cais — tsis muaj tus lej «buffer score»). Txav cov slider. Sau koj cov kev soj ntsuam. Sau txog qhov koj nrhiav pom hais txog dab tsi ua rau buffer zoo.
hmong.your_hypothesis_free_text_no_right_ans: Koj qhov kev xav (ntawv dawb — tsis muaj lus teb yog):
hmong.what_single_condition_makes_the_differ: Ib qho xwm txheej twg ua rau qhov txawv ntawm zoo thiab phem? Qhov piv puas tseem ceeb dua pKa? Pib pH puas tseem ceeb? Sau koj tus kheej txoj kev xav.
hmong.i_m_stuck_show_me_questions_to_think_a: 🤔 Kuv daig lawm — qhia cov lus nug rau kuv xav txog (tsis muaj lus teb)
hmong.open_questions_investigate_by_manipula: Cov lus nug qhib — tshawb nrhiav los ntawm kev kho:
hmong.fix_ratio_at_1_0_sweep_pka_from_2_to_1: Teeb qhov piv ntawm 1.0. Cheb pKa los ntawm 2 mus rau 12. Qee cov nqi pKa puas yog buffer zoo dua raws li ntuj? Vim li cas nws yuav yog li ntawd?
hmong.set_pka_4_74_acetic_acid_sweep_ratio_f: Teeb pKa = 4.74 (acetic acid). Cheb qhov piv los ntawm 0.05 mus rau 20. Ntawm cov piv twg buffer tuav? Puas muaj «lub thawv zoo» sib npaug hauv qhov piv?
hmong.find_one_good_buffer_then_change_one_s: Nrhiav ib lub buffer zoo. Ces hloov ib lub slider mus txog thaum nws phem. Ib qho kev hloov twg yog qhov muaj zog tshaj?
hmong.log_4_5_good_buffers_with_different_pk: Sau 4-5 lub buffer zoo nrog cov nqi pKa sib txawv. Lawv cov pib pH values muaj dab tsi sib xws nrog lawv cov pKa?
hmong.in_real_biochemistry_blood_is_buffered: Hauv biochemistry tiag, cov ntshav yog buffer ntawm pH 7.4 — pKa twg yuav zoo tshaj rau lub buffer system ntawd? Tshawb nrhiav los ntawm kev nrhiav phosphate thiab bicarbonate buffers.
hmong.no_answers_will_be_revealed_investigat: Yuav tsis muaj lus teb raug nthuav tawm. Tshawb nrhiav.
hmong.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs_le: Kuv xav tias kuv nkag siab qhov trade-off — cia kuv piav qhia lawv nrog kuv tus kheej cov lus
hmong.explain_in_your_own_words_what_is_the_: Piav qhia nrog koj tus kheej cov lus: qhov kev sib raug zoo ntawm pKa, qhov piv, thiab pib pH yog dab tsi? Ib qho xwm txheej twg (lossis kev sib xyaw) ua rau buffer tuav rau kua qaub ntau dua? Vim li cas qhov piv range tseem ceeb?
hmong.saved_notice_nobody_checked_your_answe: ✓ Khaws lawm. Nco tseg — tsis muaj leej twg kuaj koj cov lus teb. Qhov no yog qhov xwm txheej ntawm kev tshawb nrhiav coj los ntawm tus kawm.
hmong.design_note_no_buffer_capacity_score_n: Lus qhia tsim: tsis muaj buffer capacity score, tsis muaj lub pob nthuav tawm, tsis muaj kev kuaj quiz. Cov txiaj ntsig qhia raws li 2 lub xwm txheej sib cais (zoo / phem) tsis yog ib qho kev qhab nia txuas ntxiv — txhob txwm, kom txo cov cwj pwm optimizing. Qhov tseem ceeb yog kev tshawb nrhiav, tsis yog tus lej.
